title: DAST Scanner — Authentication Handling & OAuth2 Flow Support
description: dast_scanner.py performs real HTTP crawling with form/parameter discovery, OWASP Top 10 dynamic tests, and security header analysis using urllib without external dependencies. Competitive parity with ZAP/Burp Community. Gap: authentication handling supports cookie/JWT/API key but OAuth2 authorization_code flow is not implemented, blocking authenticated scans of OIDC-protected endpoints.
missing: OAuth2 authorization_code flow: implement OAuth2 authenticator that performs the full code exchange and refreshes access tokens during scans
Scan profile persistence: save scan configurations (auth, scope, exclusions) to dast_profiles.db so recurring scans reuse the same settings
SARIF output format: add export_sarif() method so DAST findings can be imported into GitHub Advanced Security and other SARIF consumers
